messages.text: fyi I'm gonna ship the GraphQL user PR on Friday — REST endpoints will be removed two weeks after
wait, mobile is still hitting /api/v1/users — did anyone tell them?
I'll drop a note in #mobile later. They'll be fine, they have time
I'm worried about the notification duplicates. We keep paging at 2am for the same thing
let's just centralize the notification service on our side. I'll start the scaffold
we need the new DB schema from Carlos before we can refactor payments — blocking BACK-203
